testcase.name: test_fix_backgrounds_runs

failure.message:
AssertionError: 502 The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration6_bg_removal.py:82: in test_fix_backgrounds_runs assert r.status_code == 200, f"{r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: 502 The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_every_active_pokemon_has_transparent_bg

failure.message: AssertionError: 3 pokemon have insufficient colored body: [('Canoebeak', 'colorful-body=5.05% (<8%)'), ('Starfire Owl', 'colorful-body=4.44% (<8%)'), ('Canoebeak', 'colorful-body=5.75% (<8%)')] assert not [('Canoebeak', 'colorful-body=5.05% (<8%)'), ('Starfire Owl', 'colorful-body=4.44% (<8%)'), ('Canoebeak', 'colorful-body=5.75% (<8%)')]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration6_bg_removal.py:120: in test_every_active_pokemon_has_transparent_bg assert not failures_body, f"{len(failures_body)} pokemon have insufficient colored body: {failures_body}" E AssertionError: 3 pokemon have insufficient colored body: [('Canoebeak', 'colorful-body=5.05% (<8%)'), ('Starfire Owl', 'colorful-body=4.44% (<8%)'), ('Canoebeak', 'colorful-body=5.75% (<8%)')] E assert not [('Canoebeak', 'colorful-body=5.05% (<8%)'), ('Starfire Owl', 'colorful-body=4.44% (<8%)'), ('Canoebeak', 'colorful-body=5.75% (<8%)')]

testcase.name: test_weekly_leaderboard_200
